# Pedro H. A. Anjos

## Computational Physicist

Multiphase Flows • Environmental Flows • Scientific Computing

I develop computational models and high-fidelity simulations to study multiphase flows, particle-laden transport, and evolving fluid interfaces in environmental and engineering systems.

---

## Research Areas

### Multiphase Flows and Transport

Understanding the dynamics of multiphase systems involving fluids with different physical properties.

### Environmental and Geophysical Flows

Computational investigations of gravity currents, turbidity currents, and sediment transport.

### Interfacial Dynamics and Pattern Formation

Hydrodynamic instabilities, evolving interfaces, and nonlinear pattern formation.

### Computational Methods

Numerical methods for fluid mechanics and scientific computing.
